caption: A man wearing a dark green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt featuring the white text "ION NEVER" and "SHIT" is speaking into a black professional microphone. He is situated in a room with walls decorated with numerous framed photographs. In the background, a white mannequin wearing a white shirt and a clothing rack are visible, along with a black office chair. Two logos appear at the bottom of the scene: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red and white logo on the right that reads "BODLY FLY 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, with slight changes in his facial expression and mouth movements as he speaks. The background and equipment remain static, maintaining a consistent setting throughout the clip.
